docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT REISKIN, EDWARD DIRECTOR MTA SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINE ECHAVIA--MTA CCSF. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARDEN, BRYAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REISKIN, EDWARD DIRECTOR MTA SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,775.00 FILED BY HARDEN, BRYAN AS TO DEFENDANT REISKIN, EDWARD DIRECTOR MTA SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARDEN, BRYAN AS TO DEFENDANT REISKIN, EDWARD DIRECTOR MTA SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-07-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REISKIN, EDWARD DIRECTOR MTA SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2014 - JUDGMENT.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO EDWARD REISKIN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-15-2014 AT 1:30 PM.
